wins.event: Q1 revenue $12B, +34% YoY (incl VMware); FY 2024 guide reiterated at $50B
AI revenue quadrupled YoY to $2.3B; 2024 AI revenue guide raised from 25% to 35% of semi (>$10B)
Networking revenue +46% YoY; 2024 guide raised from +30% to +35% YoY
Software revenue $4.6B (+156% YoY) on VMware integration; bookings $1.8B (from <$600M)
VMware Private AI Foundation partnership with NVIDIA driving on-prem AI demand

risks.event: Broadband revenue -23% YoY; 2024 outlook revised to -30% from prior -mid-teens
Server storage revenue -29% YoY; 2024 outlook revised to -mid-20s from prior -high-teens
Telco spending weakness expected to persist through most of 2024
Wireless -4% YoY; full year flat guidance retained but uncertain

guidance.notes: FY 2024 consolidated revenue guide reiterated at $50B (+40% YoY); AI raised significantly (+$10B), broadband and server storage lowered substantially. Net: mix shift, no headline change.

_notes: Strong AI/networking tailwinds with significant non-AI cyclical weakness; AI raises offset by broadband/server storage cuts. Headline guide reiterated with material mix shift.
